intro.passion: I am passionate about technology and I love to learn new things.

about.heading: About Me
about.bio_suffix: , a passionate software engineer blending design and logic to create elegant digital experiences.

education.title: Education
education.hei_desc: Built a strong foundation in software engineering principles, algorithms, and system design.
education.42_desc: Peer-to-peer learning environment focusing on practical, complex problem solving and modern stack mastery.

passions.title: What Drives Me
passions.subtitle: My passion lies in bridging the gap between design and intricate logic.
passions.coding_desc: Crafting clean, scalable, and maintainable digital experiences.
passions.solving_desc: Turning complex requirements into innovative, real-world solutions.
passions.learning_desc: Constantly pushing skills, exploring emerging tech, and staying ahead.

skills.heading: My Tech Stack
skills.subtitle: These are the technologies and tools I use most often, acquired through my studies, personal and professional projects.

projects.heading: Projects
projects.subtitle: Here are a few projects I've worked on recently.
projects.portfolio_desc: My portfolio that showcases my creative and technical skills in various professional fields. (build with react-ts)
projects.valentin_desc: A romantic and interactive digital invitation for a request for Valentine's Day.
projects.solong_desc: So Long is a small 2D game. The objective is to navigate a player through a map, collect all the collectibles, and then reach the exit.
projects.cub3d_desc: A 3D maze exploration game built from scratch using ray-casting and the MinilibX graphics library, inspired by the classic Wolfenstein 3D to explore the fundamentals of computer graphics and game design.
projects.coucou_desc: Coucou API powers the backend of the Coucou chat app, managing authentication, real-time messaging, and conversations. Built with NestJS for scalability and maintainability, it serves as the foundation for a full-featured messenger.

projects_42.heading: 42 Cursus
projects_42.subtitle: Common Core projects representing my progression and mastery of system programing, networks, algorithms, and devops.
projects_42.libft_desc: My first library of standard C functions, rewritten from scratch to understand the internals of libc.
projects_42.get_next_line_desc: A function that reads a line from a file descriptor, handling multiple file descriptors and static variables.
projects_42.ft_printf_desc: A custom implementation of the formatted output libc function printf, supporting standard formats.
projects_42.born2beroot_desc: Setting up a secure Debian virtual machine with strict password policies, SSH, UFW, sudo, and active monitoring scripts.
projects_42.push_swap_desc: A highly optimized sorting algorithm project using two stacks and a limited instruction set.
projects_42.minitalk_desc: A client-server communication application using UNIX signals (SIGUSR1 and SIGUSR2) for binary data transfer.
projects_42.solong_desc: A small 2D game focusing on window management, event handling (keyboard, mouse) and basic rendering with MiniLibX.
projects_42.pipex_desc: Recoding the UNIX pipe mechanism to redirect standard input/output streams between consecutive commands.
projects_42.minishell_desc: A fully functional shell interpreter mimicking bash, with environment variables, history, paths, redirections, and pipes.
projects_42.philosophers_desc: An implementation of the Dining Philosophers problem, learning thread synchronization, mutexes, and deadlock prevention.
projects_42.cub3d_desc: A 3D graphics game engine inspired by Wolfenstein 3D, implementing raycasting principles to render a first-person perspective.
projects_42.netpractice_desc: A modular, puzzle-based networking project to understand subnets, IP addressing, routing tables, and interface configurations.
projects_42.inception_desc: A DevOps project setting up a secure multi-container infrastructure with Nginx, WordPress, and MariaDB using Docker.
projects_42.ft_irc_desc: Writing an IRC server from scratch in C++98, handling TCP sockets, select()/poll() multiplexing, and IRC protocols.
projects_42.webserv_desc: An HTTP/1.1 server written in C++98, implementing non-blocking sockets, request parsing, CGI execution, and configuration files.
projects_42.transcendence_desc: The ultimate 42 common core web project featuring real-time multiplayer Pong, chat rooms, game lobbies, and user profiles.

contact.heading: Let's Connect
contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind or just want to say hi? I'd love to hear from you.
contact.body: Whether it's a job opportunity, a freelance project, or a technical discussion, my inbox is always open. Fill out the form and I'll get back to you as soon as possible.

form.name: Your Name
form.subject: Subject
form.success: 🎉 Thanks! Your message has been sent. I'll get back to you soon.
form.error: ❌ Oops! Something went wrong. Please try again.
